overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a white hat and red coat riding a horse to a rural wooden train station, dismounting, and walking along the platform. The scene features detailed Western architecture, railroad tracks, and mountainous terrain in the background.

events.description: character dismounts horse and transitions to walking

agents.ego_description: riding a horse up to the station hitching rail, then dismounting and landing on the dirt ground

entered.detail: two-story wooden Western-style station building with dark timber walls and shingled roof
wooden railing where horses are tethered, running along the front of the station
rocky mountain slopes with scattered pine trees in the background
wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character rides a horse toward a wooden rural train station in a mountainous area. After approaching the hitching rail, the character dismounts and lands on the dirt ground, with the station building looming ahead and mountains visible in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of the wooden station building on a dirt path beside a wooden fence

entered.detail: simple wooden post fence running parallel to the building
unpaved dirt path with grass growing along the edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path between the station building and a wooden fence, moving away from the hitching area. The station building remains on the left while the path leads toward the railway tracks visible in the distance.

events.description: steps from dirt path onto wooden railway platform next to tracks
passes by an NPC sitting on a barrel at the platform edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden railway platform, passing a seated man and continuing toward the open landscape

notable_agents.action: sitting on a barrel at the platform edge, leaning forward with arms resting on knees
walking along the platform in the same direction as the player, gradually moving further away

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway running alongside the railroad tracks
metal railway tracks with wooden ties and gravel ballast
tall wooden water tower with elevated tank structure for steam locomotives

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wooden railway platform next to active tracks, passing a man sitting on a barrel who watches the surroundings. The platform extends into the open countryside with a water tower visible ahead, while the station building recedes behind and mountains rise in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a horseback approach to a walk along a rural railway platform set against a mountainous backdrop. It begins with the character riding toward a wooden train station before dismounting onto the dirt ground near a hitching rail. As the character moves away from the horse, the scene shifts to a narrow dirt path squeezed between the station building and a wooden fence. The camera then follows the character as they step from the dirt onto the wooden railway platform, passing a man seated on a barrel. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal the active tracks and a distant water tower as the station building recedes and the mountains loom in the background.
